title: Add ConsensusWindow Bypass (FAT-Golf) non-record submission
author: TheDryhtscipe

data.description: Replaces SmearGate with a depthwise causal conv1d embedding bypass using a larger local receptive field.
Adds a parallel depthwise causal convolution bypass path in the deepest layers, blended with attention via a per-dimension sigmoid gate.
Uses BigramHash as part of the baseline architecture.
Uses XSA as part of the baseline architecture.
Uses value enhancement (VE) as part of the baseline architecture.
Uses LeakyReLU squared activation in the model.

novel_contributions: Depthwise causal convolution bypass at the embedding level via ConsensusWindowEmbed
Parallel depthwise causal convolution bypass in the deepest 4 layers via ConsensusBlockBypass
Per-dimension sigmoid gating to blend attention and bypass outputs
Improved robustness to EMA averaging and int6 quantization
Combined architecture shows better post-quantization validation BPB than baseline in small-scale experiments
